'''Tolsk''' was an officer of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]].

An inaugural officer of the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|New Republic Fifth Battle Group]], [[Commodore/Legends|Commodore]] Tolsk was placed in command of [[Task Force Blackvine]]. During the [[Black Fleet Crisis]], Tolsk led Blackvine in the [[Battle of Doornik-319]] and also took command of [[Task Force Keyhole]] for several operations.

{{Char-stub}}
